case_title: ANTONINI PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION VS GILBERT RANDOLPH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $598.40 FILED BY ANTONINI PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT RANDOLPH GILBERT AMY GRACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT AMY GRACE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT RANDOLPH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANTONINI PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GILBERT RANDOLPH GILBERT AMY GRACE EACH PARTY TO PAY OWN COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
